summary_one_line: A valid ICC header with a tag table containing two link-compatible tags whose descriptors have equal ElemCount

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The input must be a well-formed ICC profile: literal magic 'lcms'/'acsp' anchors at the header offsets plus a tag table whose entries pass the (offset,size) link check at line 855-856 so two tag descriptors are fetched and compared; the true side of line 706 is taken when those two descriptors have equal ElemCount.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner-resolving seeds carry the exact header magic byte runs ('lcms' at 0x04-0x07, 'acsp'/'APPL' at 0x24-0x2b, XYZ/RGB color-space tokens at 0x10-0x16) intact, which lets _cmsReadHeader parse the tag table and invoke CompatibleTypes; line 706 reaches T=40 (W) vs T=0 (L), i.e. only the winner ever takes the blocked true side.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds corrupt the structural anchors needed downstream — e.g. offset 0x00 carries ff/92/80 and offset 0x17-0x19 carries e8 03 00 (a 0x3e8 size value) instead of the winner's 20 07 d9 — so the tag (offset,size) link check and descriptor lookup never produce a matching descriptor pair, and line 706 stays at T=0 F=543 (false side only).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace, which reads the CmpLogObserver buffer and splices a logged comparison operand into the matching input offsets. This is what installs the exact header/tag literals (magic, size, color-space fourccs) that naive/value_profile must hit by blind havoc; both winning sides are cmplog/vpc (the two I2S-delta pairs) and their lineage carries I2S-floor dash rows.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality compare on ElemCount of two tag descriptors and its true (blocked) side is globally unreached by losers.
The blocker is reached only after _cmsReadHeader parses the tag table and the (offset,size) link check selects a matching tag, then calls CompatibleTypes.
Only the winner takes the true side of line 706; the loser stays entirely on the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 706  T=40 F=87  T=0 F=543  if (desc1->ElemCount != desc2->ElemCount) return FALSE;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds carry the intact 'lcms' magic byte run at offset 0x04-0x07.
Loser-blocking seeds corrupt offset 0x00 with ff/92/80 values absent from the winner set.
Losers carry an e8 03 size value at offset 0x17-0x19 where winners hold the consistent 20 07 d9 run.
cmplog/vpc add I2SRandReplace, which scans the input for a logged operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs are I2S deltas with the cmplog/vpc side winning.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2136 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed cec3f5055616dfb8`: I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 and 6. Also ran `--fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 683609162d4e0be9`: dash rows at depth 3 and 4. Both winning chains (one per I2S pair) share common dash-row ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03, confirming I2S contribution in both winners.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same ElemCount equality gate behind a parsed-header anchor in which naive/value_profile reach the true side as often as cmplog/vpc (no I2S advantage), or in which cmplog/vpc winners' lineages contain no I2S-floor dash rows.

weakest_evidence_point: The BYTE DIFF section only marks offsets as PARTIAL (mixed within each role), so the exact descriptor bytes that make two ElemCount values equal are inferred from the structural header/tag-table path rather than read off a single decisive offset.
